prompt: A highly detailed fantasy trading card in a premium collectible card game style, vertical layout with an ornate antique gold frame, dark emerald-green enamel panels, and intricate vine-and-leaf embellishments. The card title at the top reads AELION in large elegant serif capitals, with the subtitle "ELF OF THE GREENWOOD" beneath it. In the central illustration, depict a realistic high-fantasy elf ranger standing in a sun-dappled forest. He has long golden blond hair, pointed ears, and wears layered dark green leather-and-metal armor with engraved details, a hooded cloak, belts, bracers, and woodland-themed ornamentation. He carries an ornate recurved bow in one hand and a quiver of arrows on his back, posed alertly as if tracking prey through the trees. The forest background is lush, atmospheric, and cinematic, with shafts of warm light filtering through branches and leaves. The overall palette is green, bronze, gold, and earthy brown, with a moody heroic tone and realistic painterly rendering. On the upper left, include a circular faction crest showing 3 gold leaves. On the upper right, include a small shield emblem with a white tree icon. Along the left edge, place exactly 4 vertically stacked stat icons in circular medallions with large numbers beside them: a sword with 3, a shield with 2, a heart with 3, and a boot with 2. At the bottom left, add a large green gem-like badge with the number 4. At the bottom right, add a circular class or weapon icon showing a bow-and-arrow symbol. In a parchment text box across the lower third, include exactly 2 ability entries with decorative leaf bullets and serif typography. The first ability name is "WOODLAND PRECISION" followed by the rules text: "When Aelion attacks, he deals +1 damage if the target is at 2 or more spaces away." The second ability name is "NATURE’S STEP" followed by the rules text: "Once per turn, Aelion may move up to 2 additional spaces through forest terrain." Centered below the abilities, add an italic flavor quote: The wind in the leaves is my guide, and the forest my silence. At the very bottom, on a dark green nameplate, write the type line "ALLY • ELF • RANGER". Use crisp, legible text, polished card-game UI design, balanced margins, and a finished professional TCG product look similar to a premium fantasy strategy card.
